description: Create a GitHub Actions release workflow that triggers on push of tags matching v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+, on a scheduled cron job, and on workflow dispatch with an optional tag_name input. The workflow has three build jobs for Linux, macOS, and Windows, each checking out the code, installing dependencies, building a release package, and uploading it as an artifact. A subsequent publish job, dependent on the build jobs, downloads the artifacts, generates a release body based on the event type and tag name, and creates a GitHub release with the artifacts.
